ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with all fields legible. Certificate number SEG-26D-455373, issued 2026-02-13 by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. Invoice number SEC9001281, dated 2026-02-07. Single page. NOTE: This is a DIFFERENT invoice from the one embedded in the certificate file (SEC9001215). The certificate file pages 2-3 contain invoice SEC9001215 which is NOT the same as the separate invoice file SEC9001281.

document_pairing.method: File-based pairing per 8.5.0. Certificate from file 1 (page 1), invoice from file 2 (page 1).
document_pairing.pairing_notes: CRITICAL ISSUE: The certificate does NOT contain an explicit invoice number reference. The certificate file (pages 2-3) contains an embedded invoice SEC9001215 with matching VINs. The separate invoice file contains invoice SEC9001281 with DIFFERENT VINs, DIFFERENT material (B8R), DIFFERENT weight, and DIFFERENT ACID. Per rule 8.5.0, verification must be against the separate invoice file (SEC9001281), not the embedded invoice. However, the certificate's goods (2 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD with VINs YV3U1W122TA225988 and YV3U1W120TA225987) do NOT match the separate invoice's goods (1 B8R with VIN YV3T7U528TA226183). This strongly suggests the wrong invoice was attached.

sanity_check_8_6.criterion_1_invoice_ref: FAIL - Certificate does not contain an explicit invoice number. Cannot match against invoice SEC9001281.
sanity_check_8_6.criterion_2_consignor: PASS - Certificate consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' matches invoice issuer 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION'.
sanity_check_8_6.criterion_3_consignee: PASS - Certificate consignee 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' can be identified in invoice consignee field as 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles'.
sanity_check_8_6.result: PASS (criteria 2 and 3 met). Pairing validation passed on consignor and consignee, but goods content diverges significantly.

results.location: Invoice file (Document B), page 1, header - 'VOLVO BUS CORPORATION'
results.context: Invoice issuer/seller identification in header block

results.location: Invoice file (Document B), page 1, footer - 'Volvo Bus Corporation, SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden'

lc_check.reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate contains references such as ACID, Egyptian Importer Tax ID, Foreign Exporter ID, and certificate number SEG-26D-455373 — none of which constitute an LC reference.

Name matches exactly after case normalization. Country verified via VAT SE prefix and explicit footer address. MATCH per 4.1.0 and 4.1.2.1.

consignee.certificate_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E, Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo, Egypt
consignee.invoice_value: Consignee: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles, KM 24, Cairo-Ismailia Road, 00000 CAIRO, Egypt

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has both Buyer and Consignee fields. Buyer is 'Volvo Bus Corp. (VAT-Reg) GB' in United Kingdom. Consignee is 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles' in Egypt.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate consignee does not match Buyer field. Check Consignee field.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has an explicit Consignee field with 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles'. Certificate states 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E'. The core name 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles' is present in both.
comparison_steps.result: Core name matches. Invoice Consignee field is a dedicated consignee field per 4.2.0.1.

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.3.5 applied to consignee - Omitted organization words
comparison_steps.description: Certificate has '(MCV) S.A.E' which is an abbreviation in parentheses plus Egyptian legal form 'S.A.E' (Société Anonyme Egyptienne). Invoice omits these. Core name 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles' is identical.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Difference is only in legal form designation 'S.A.E' and parenthetical abbreviation '(MCV)' which are organizational/legal form elements per 4.1.3.5 and 4.1.3.6.

rules_applied.description: Consignee identified in invoice's explicit Consignee field
Omitted organization word - '(MCV)' is a parenthetical abbreviation, not identity-bearing
Legal form abbreviation - 'S.A.E' is Egyptian legal form designation
Country Egypt matches in both documents

evidence.raw_text: Volvo Bus Corp. (VAT-Reg) GB, Wedgnock Lane, CV34 5YA WARWICK, United Kingdom
evidence.relevance: Buyer is a different party (Volvo Bus Corp GB) - not the certificate consignee

evidence.raw_text: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles, KM 24, Cairo-Ismailia Road, 00000 CAIRO, Egypt
evidence.relevance: Consignee field matches certificate consignee core name and country

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' in Egypt. Invoice has a dedicated Consignee field showing 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles' in Egypt. The core name 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles' is identical. The certificate additionally shows '(MCV)' (parenthetical abbreviation) and 'S.A.E' (Egyptian legal form Société Anonyme Egyptienne). Per 4.1.3.5, the parenthetical abbreviation is not identity-bearing. Per 4.1.3.6, 'S.A.E' is a legal form designation. Country Egypt matches. Address differs slightly ('Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City' vs 'Cairo-Ismailia Road, 00000 CAIRO') but per 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country match. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per 4.1.3.5 and 4.1.3.6, parenthetical abbreviations and legal form designations are not identity-bearing. Core company name 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles' matches exactly.

goods_description.invoice_value: B8R, Chassis No 226183, VIN No YV3T7U528TA226183

comparison_steps.description: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers. VIN numbers serve as vehicle identifiers.
comparison_steps.result: No article numbers to compare. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 - Priority 2: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing designation
comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD'. Invoice: 'B8R'. These are completely different product designations. 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD' cannot be identified in the invoice text.
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH - identity-bearing designation not found in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate VINs: YV3U1W122TA225988, YV3U1W120TA225987. Invoice VIN: YV3T7U528TA226183. These are entirely different VIN numbers with no common substring match.
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH - VIN numbers are completely different vehicles.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice shows 'B8R' which could be a model code. However, certificate shows 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD' which is a different model designation entirely. The VINs confirm these are different vehicles.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable - VINs conclusively prove these are different vehicles, not abbreviated versions of the same vehicle.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing designation 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD' cannot be identified in invoice which shows 'B8R'

evidence.raw_text:
2 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD
YV3U1W122TA225988, YV3U1W120TA225987

evidence.relevance: Invoice material description - completely different from certificate
Invoice VIN number - completely different vehicle

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes '2 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD' with VINs YV3U1W122TA225988 and YV3U1W120TA225987. The separate invoice (SEC9001281) describes 'B8R' with VIN YV3T7U528TA226183. The material descriptions are entirely different, the VINs are entirely different, and the quantity differs (2 vs 1). The certificate's goods cannot be identified anywhere in the separate invoice. This is a clear MISMATCH — the invoice appears to be for a different vehicle/shipment entirely. Note: the embedded invoice in the certificate file (SEC9001215) does match the certificate's goods, but per rule 8.5.0, verification must be against the separate invoice file.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: B8R might be an abbreviation for BERL SD
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: B8R and BERL SD are completely different designations. Additionally, the VIN numbers conclusively prove these are different vehicles. No normalization rule permits matching different vehicles.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Use embedded invoice SEC9001215 from certificate file for verification
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 8.5.0, verification must be against the separate invoice file (Document B), not against invoices embedded in the certificate file. The embedded invoice is supplementary material belonging to the certificate document.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'GW 11000 kg'. This is the verification-grounding quantity per 4.4.2.1.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 - Occurrence check for GW 11000 kg in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Invoice shows Total weight:[KG] 5942. Certificate value 11000 ≠ invoice value 5942. Deviation: (11000-5942)/11000 = 46% which far exceeds ±0.1% tolerance.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.3.1 - Check secondary quantity (2 units from box 6)
comparison_steps.description: Certificate indicates 2 chassis units. Invoice shows Quantity: 1. These are also different.
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH - 2 units vs 1 unit. Both quantity measures differ.

comparison_steps.description: No exceptions applicable. Single invoice, single unit, no summation possible. The values are fundamentally different.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value GW 11000 kg is verification-grounding quantity
Occurrence check: 11000 kg not found in invoice (invoice shows 5942 kg)
Explicit contradiction: both GW and piece count differ between certificate and invoice

evidence.relevance: Invoice total weight - 5942 kg vs certificate 11000 kg

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states GW 11000 kg. Invoice states Total weight:[KG] 5942. The values differ by 5058 kg (46% deviation), far exceeding the ±0.1% tolerance. Additionally, certificate indicates 2 units while invoice shows 1 unit. Both quantity metrics are explicitly contradicted. MISMATCH per 4.4.1 and 4.4.3.1.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: 5942 might be a partial weight and other invoices cover the remainder
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Only one invoice is provided in the invoice file. Exception 3A requires multiple invoices to be present. No evidence of additional invoices in the separate invoice file.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Country of origin: SE; certification statement: 'country of origin or manufacture of the goods is Sweden'

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has explicit 'Country of origin: SE' field and certification statement 'the country of origin or manufacture of the goods is Sweden'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Sweden = SE (ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden).

evidence.relevance: Explicit origin field showing SE = Sweden

evidence.raw_text: the country of origin or manufacture of the goods is Sweden

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states origin 'Sweden'. Invoice has an explicit 'Country of origin: SE' field and a certification statement confirming 'the country of origin or manufacture of the goods is Sweden'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden. MATCH per 4.5.4.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate
Certificate from file 1 (page 1). Invoice from file 2 (SEC9001281). Certificate file pages 2-3 contain embedded invoice SEC9001215 which is NOT used for verification per 8.5.0 rule 3-4.

Criterion 1 (invoice ref): FAIL - no invoice number in certificate. Criterion 2 (consignor): PASS - Volvo Bus Corporation found. Criterion 3 (consignee): PASS - Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles found. At least one criterion met.
Volvo Bus Corporation found in invoice header and footer
VAT prefix SE, footer address Sweden
Invoice has dedicated Consignee field. Buyer is different party (Volvo Bus Corp GB). Consignee field used for verification.
Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles found in invoice Consignee field

rule_evaluation_log.description: Omitted organization words applied to consignee
Legal form abbreviation applied to consignee
rule_evaluation_log.details: S.A.E is Egyptian legal form designation
'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD' not found in invoice. Invoice shows 'B8R'. VINs are completely different vehicles.
GW 11000 kg vs Total weight 5942 kg. 46% deviation. Piece count 2 vs 1.
Both values already in KG, no conversion needed. Values still don't match.
Certificate does not specify per-unit weight
Invoice has only one row with no additional rows to sum
Sweden in certificate, SE in invoice Country of origin field

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet avser 2 stycken Volvo Bus Chassis BERL SD med VIN-nummer YV3U1W122TA225988 och YV3U1W120TA225987 och en bruttovikt på 11 000 kg, men den bifogade fakturan (SEC9001281) avser en helt annan vara – 1 styck B8R med VIN-nummer YV3T7U528TA226183 och totalvikt 5 942 kg. Varubeskrivning och kvantitet stämmer inte överens, vilket tyder på att fel faktura har bifogats.
blocking_issues: Goods description MISMATCH: Certificate describes '2 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD' with VINs YV3U1W122TA225988 and YV3U1W120TA225987. Invoice describes '1 B8R' with VIN YV3T7U528TA226183. Completely different vehicles.
Quantity MISMATCH: Certificate states GW 11000 kg and 2 units. Invoice states Total weight 5942 kg and 1 unit. Both weight and piece count differ significantly.
overall_assessment.summary_notes: The certificate and the separate invoice file describe different vehicles/shipments entirely. The certificate file contains an embedded invoice (SEC9001215) that appears to match the certificate's goods, but per rule 8.5.0, verification must be performed against the separate invoice file (SEC9001281). The separate invoice describes a different vehicle (B8R vs BERL SD), different VINs, different weight (5942 vs 11000 kg), different quantity (1 vs 2), and a different ACID number. Consignor and consignee match between documents, and country of origin (Sweden) matches, but the goods content diverges completely.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Volvo Bus Corporation, Gropegårdsgatan 11, 405 08, GOTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: VOLVO BUS CORPORATION, VAT No. SE556197382601, Footer: Volvo Bus Corporation, SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Företagsnamnet 'Volvo Bus Corporation' identifieras i fakturans sidhuvud och sidfot. Land verifierat via VAT-prefix SE och explicit adress 'Sweden' i sidfoten.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Volvo Bus Corporation' med adress i Sverige återfinns identiskt (efter normalisering av versaler) i fakturans sidhuvud ('VOLVO BUS CORPORATION') och sidfot ('Volvo Bus Corporation, SE-405 08 Göteborg, Sweden'). Land Sverige verifieras genom VAT-prefix SE i SE556197382601 och explicit adressuppgift.

sections.certificate_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E, Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road, El-Obour City, Cairo, Egypt
sections.invoice_value: Consignee: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles, KM 24, Cairo-Ismailia Road, 00000 CAIRO, Egypt
sections.rule_applied: Kärnnamnet 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles' identiskt i båda dokumenten. '(MCV)' och 'S.A.E' behandlas som organisationsord/juridisk bolagsform som inte påverkar identiteten. Land Egypten överensstämmer.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' i Egypten identifieras i fakturans dedikerade Consignee-fält som 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles' i Egypten. Kärnnamnet matchar exakt. '(MCV)' är en icke-identitetsbärande parentetisk förkortning (4.1.3.5) och 'S.A.E' är en egyptisk juridisk bolagsform (4.1.3.6). Land överensstämmer.

sections.certificate_value: 2 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD, VIN YV3U1W122TA225988, YV3U1W120TA225987
sections.invoice_value: B8R, Chassis No 226183, VIN No YV3T7U528TA226183
sections.rule_applied: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD' kan inte identifieras i fakturan som visar 'B8R'. VIN-numren är helt olika och avser olika fordon.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet beskriver '2 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS BERL SD' med VIN YV3U1W122TA225988 och YV3U1W120TA225987. Fakturan (SEC9001281) beskriver 'B8R' med VIN YV3T7U528TA226183. Produktbeteckningarna är helt olika och VIN-numren bekräftar att det rör sig om olika fordon. Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen kan inte identifieras i fakturan. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Certifikatets bruttovikt 11 000 kg kan inte identifieras i fakturan som anger 5 942 kg. Avvikelsen överstiger toleransen på ±0,1 %. Även antalet enheter skiljer sig (2 vs 1).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger GW 11 000 kg. Fakturans totalvikt är 5 942 kg. Avvikelsen är 5 058 kg (ca 46 %), långt över den tillåtna toleransen på ±0,1 %. Certifikatet anger dessutom 2 enheter medan fakturan anger 1 enhet. Båda kvantitetsmåtten uppvisar uttrycklig motsägelse. MISMATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Country of origin: SE; 'country of origin or manufacture of the goods is Sweden'
sections.rule_applied: Sverige = SE (ISO-landskod). Fakturan bekräftar ursprung Sverige i ett dedikerat fält och i en certifieringstext.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 3 anger ursprung 'Sweden'. Fakturan har ett explicit 'Country of origin: SE'-fält och en certifieringstext som bekräftar 'the country of origin or manufacture of the goods is Sweden'. SE = Sweden per ISO alpha-2 normalisering. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: Two checkpoints (goods_description and quantity) have MISMATCH status. comparison_result is NOT_IDENTICAL, which is consistent. workflow_recommendation is MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED, consistent with NOT_IDENTICAL. Motivations for MISMATCH checkpoints clearly describe the mismatches found. No inconsistencies detected.
